productDisplayName: Guess Women Mini Prism Steel Watch
description: guess watches are creative masterpieces with absolute durability. They have proven themselves in the art of creating high quality timepieces, by combining the epitome of style with impeccable technology. The new range of watches are a fresh take on perfection and are great for urban wear. Case diameter: 32 mm Case thickness: 8 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 years Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel and crystal embellishments with a steel strap guess logo at the 3 hour mark Butterfly clasp with a silver dial with metallic numbers and metallic hands Two chronograph time displays with date and day for easy reading of time Polished hands to mark sub dials Screw to reset time, alarm and set the timer Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering
